headline: NIQ Aims Deeper Role In Retail Decisions With New AI Pricing Platform
summary: NIQ Global Intelligence (NYSE:NIQ) has launched its AI-enabled Price & Promo Optimizer platform, designed to centralize pricing and promotion workflows for manufacturers. The platform uses store-level data to support scenario simulation and data-driven decisions on pricing and promotional plans. NIQ has also expanded its integrations with RangeMe and entered a data-sharing partnership with Ulta Beauty to deepen retail collaboration and product discovery. For investors tracking NYSE:NIQ,...
